steps.t: Wyrmsgráf can be found in Elderslade. You should search for evidence of Karazgar in Wyrmsgráf.
A note addressed to you can be found in Wyrmsgráf. You should read the note.
Léothred can be found in Wyrmsgráf. You should talk to Léothred.
Wyrmsgráf can be found in Elderslade. You should search for evidence of Scatha's hoard.
Fróthi can be found in Wyrmsgráf. You should talk to Fróthi.
Wyrmsgráf can be found in Elderslade. You should collect some of Scatha's hoard for Fróthi.
Léothred can be found in Wyrmsgráf. You should talk to Léothred.
